summary: Tested Admin Attributes UI State Hydration in Bulk Category Editor. Found CRITICAL BUG: Category selections (cat_* keys) are NOT being saved to products, causing hydration failure when reopening modal. Specifications (spec_*) hydration works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Category selections (cat_* keys like cat_mosaic-tiles, cat_floor-tiles) are NOT being included in bulkCategorySelections state when handleBulkCategoryUpdate is called. Visual state (button highlighting) works, but actual state value is missing.
ui_bugs.evidence: Console log shows: bulkCategorySelections: {material: Porcelain, finish: , auto_detect_finish: false...} - NO cat_* keys present despite button being highlighted green

integration_issues.issue: When reopening Bulk Category Editor for same products, previously saved categories do NOT appear highlighted. Products have empty sub_categories[] and null main_category in database.

action_items: CRITICAL: Debug why cat_* keys are not being included in bulkCategorySelections state when handleBulkCategoryUpdate is called
Check if there's a React state batching issue or closure issue in handleBulkCategoryUpdate
Verify setBulkCategorySelections is being called correctly from BulkCategoryEditorSections.jsx line 720-723
Add console.log in category button onClick to verify state update is happening
Check if the state is being reset somewhere between category click and Apply button click
critical_code_review_comments: Line 2705 validation checks hasMainCategory and hasSubCategories but cat_* keys are only converted to these AFTER validation at lines 2951-2991
The console.log at line 3050 shows bulkCategorySelections WITHOUT cat_* keys despite button being visually selected
Possible stale closure issue: handleBulkCategoryUpdate may be reading old state reference

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Specifications hydration works, Categories hydration FAILS

test_credentials: Admin: test@admin.com / testpass123 (NOT qasim@tilestation.co.uk as provided)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Bulk Category Editor modal has 3 sections: Categories (green), Filters (blue), Specifications (purple). When clicking a category button, it visually highlights (bg-green-600) and shows '1 selected' badge. However, when Apply is clicked, the cat_* keys are NOT in the bulkCategorySelections state. This causes: 1) Categories not being saved to products (sub_categories stays empty), 2) Categories not being hydrated when reopening modal. Specifications (spec_*) work correctly - Porcelain material IS highlighted on reopen.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Category button clicks update visual state (isSelected check at line 714 works) but the cat_* keys are not present in bulkCategorySelections when handleBulkCategoryUpdate reads the state at line 3050
reproduction_steps: 4. Click 'Edit Categories' button to open Bulk Category Editor
5. Click on a category like 'Mosaic Tiles' - it turns green with checkmark
7. Click 'Confirm & Apply' in the confirmation dialog
8. Observe console: bulkCategorySelections does NOT contain cat_mosaic-tiles key
9. Close modal and reopen - Mosaic Tiles is NOT highlighted (hydration failure)
potential_fixes: 1. Add useCallback with proper dependencies to handleBulkCategoryUpdate
2. Use a ref to track current state value instead of closure
3. Pass bulkCategorySelections as parameter to handleBulkCategoryUpdate
4. Debug React DevTools to see actual state at time of Apply click

verified_working.category_button_visual_state: Clicking category buttons highlights them correctly

not_working.category_state_persistence: cat_* keys not in state when Apply is clicked
not_working.category_save_to_database: sub_categories stays empty, main_category stays null
not_working.category_hydration_on_reopen: Categories not highlighted when reopening modal
